title: Per-Persona Model Routing in go-orca
rationale: Content workflow with all five personas per mode rules. Director uses qwen3.5:9b (bootstrap). The implementer needs a tool-capable model (qwen2.5-coder:14b) to write code examples. Finalizer gets the same for synthesis. PM, architect, and qa use qwen3.5:9b for efficient planning/validation. The content will be generated via blog-draft action which handles markdown artifact conversion to polished blog posts.
summary: Technical blog post explaining per-persona model routing in go-orca, covering model catalog discovery, routing rationale, and configuration examples
